title: Uruguayan Tripe Stir Fry
description: A unique fusion of Uruguayan beef tripe and Chinese flavors in a savory stir fry.

ingredients.name: Uruguayan tripe
ingredients.amount: 1 pound, cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat the Medley of aromas oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it begins to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the Uruguayan tripe and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the Medley of aromas soy sauce and brown sugar; stir to combine.
Continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes or until the tripe is cooked through.
Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
